source_message: MES counterpart of the 06-16 NY-AM Stage-G session, recorded to PAIR with the existing MNQ tape (2026-06-16-ny-am-replay) for the pair-leader fold (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-25-faithful-pair-leader-design.md). expected is a PLACEHOLDER — the leader ground truth is Lanto's actual Discord instrument pick, graded separately; this tape supplies MES's open-window engine + chain outcome for the SMT/relative-strength fold. verified stays false.
